      {
        "url": "https://topsyde.com/blog/agency-client-retention-hosting",
        "title": "Agency Client Retention: How Better Hosting Reduces Churn by 40% — TopSyde",
        "description": "Better hosting infrastructure directly impacts agency client retention rates by eliminating the primary reasons clients leave: slow websites, frequent downtime, and reactive problem-solving that makes agencies look unreliable.
[...]
According to a 2024 study by Agency Analytics, 62% of agencies report losing clients due to technical issues rather than creative disagreements or budget constraints. The top three client complaints mirror the exact problems that cheap hosting creates:
[...]
Website performance issues (38% of departures): Slow loading times directly impact client revenue. When a law firm's website takes 6 seconds to load instead of 2 seconds, they lose 32% of potential leads before the first consultation call.
[...]
Frequent downtime (24% of departures): Nothing destroys client confidence faster than their website being offline during peak business hours. Restaurant clients lose hundreds of dollars per hour when reservation systems go down during dinner rush.
[...]
Poor communication during emergencies (19% of departures): When agencies scramble to fix hosting problems they don't understand, clients see chaos instead of expertise.
[...]
Here's what most agencies don't realize: these aren't really "technical problems" — they're client retention problems disguised as hosting issues.
[...]
| Hosting Type | Monthly Cost | Hidden Costs | Annual Impact |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Shared Hosting | $5-15 | Client churn, emergency fixes, reputation damage | -$25,000 |
| Basic VPS | $20-50 | Server management time, security incidents | -$12,000 |
| Managed WordPress | $89-200 | Minimal issues, proactive support | +$35,000 |
[...]
- Client retention increased from 68% to 91%
- Average client lifetime value grew from $24,000 to $42,000
- Time spent on technical support dropped by 75%
- New client referrals increased by 45%
[...]
80,
[...]
Premium hosting providers monitor infrastructure 24/7 and catch problems before they impact client websites. This shift from reactive to proactive positioning transforms how clients perceive agency value.
[...]
Uptime monitoring with instant alerts: Instead of clients calling to report downtime, agencies receive notifications first and can communicate proactively. "We noticed a brief service interruption and already resolved it" builds far more trust than "Sorry, we're looking into the problem now."
[...]
94% of malware infections according to
[...]
uri's
[...]
2024 threat
[...]
the reputation damage and emergency cleanup costs that destroy
[...]
Clients pay $297 for services worth $409, but agencies earn higher margins because hosting problems rarely consume the allocated maintenance hours. Most months require zero intervention due to proactive infrastructure management.
[...]
- Retained 8 clients who would have churned ($180,000)
- Gained 12 referrals from satisfied clients ($160,000)
- Eliminated 200 hours of technical support work
[...]
Agencies typically see 30-40% improvement in client retention when switching from budget hosting to managed WordPress hosting. The key is eliminating technical problems that make agencies look unreliable, while proactive monitoring positions you as a strategic technology partner rather than reactive service provider.
[...]
Most agencies break even within 3-4 months due to reduced churn and increased referrals. The average agency saves $25,000 annually in retained client revenue while eliminating 10-15 hours weekly of technical support work. Premium hosting pays for itself through improved client lifetime values.
[...]
services, clients
[...]
rates for comprehensive support rather than
[...]
hosting as a commodity service they can purchase elsewhere for cheaper.
[...]
Uptime monitoring with proactive alerts, staging environments for safe updates, automated security scanning, and detailed performance reporting are essential. Clients need to see consistent reliability and receive communication before problems impact their business operations.",
        "position": 1
      },
      {
        "url": "https://whitelabelninja.com/why-do-most-digital-agencies-lose-clients-after-the-first-year/",
        "title": "Why Do Most Digital Agencies Lose Clients After the First Year?",
        "description": "Navigating the dynamic landscape of digital marketing, agencies often face the challenge of retaining clients beyond the first year. Despite initial excitement and potential, many agencies struggle to maintain these relationships long-term. This blog delves into the primary reasons for this trend and provides insights on improving client retention.
[...]
A notable statistic from the IT sector indicates a 12% client churn rate within the first year, underscoring a pervasive issue across industries. This significant figure highlights the necessity for strategies aimed at sustaining client relationships.
[...]
Key Reasons for High Client Churn
[...]
- Compromised Quality: Inconsistencies in quality and a lack of attention to detail can erode client trust and satisfaction, leading to churn.
[...]
- Narrow Service Offering: As client needs evolve, they may require services beyond the initial scope. Agencies that fail to adapt and expand their offerings can quickly find themselves outgrown by client needs.
[...]
- Limited Engagement: Engagement involves more than regular updates; it requires actively seeking client feedback and involvement in the process. Neglecting this can make clients feel disconnected from the strategies implemented on their behalf.
[...]
- Ineffective Project Management: Disorganized project management can lead to missed deadlines and chaotic workflows, which detract from the professionalism clients expect.
[...]
- Poor Communication and Transparency: Clients expect regular updates and open communication. A lack of transparency regarding project progress and results can frustrate clients and make them feel undervalued, prompting them to end their contracts.
[...]
- Lack of Proven Results: Without tangible outcomes, client trust diminishes. Agencies must demonstrate effective results through reliable strategies and clear metrics to build confidence and justify continued investment.
[...]
- Unrealistic Expectations: Clients often have high expectations for immediate, impressive results. Failure to set realistic expectations or to translate initial excitement into quick wins can lead to disappointment and client departure.
[...]
adaptive and responsive to changing
[...]
conditions and client needs.
[...]
your services to
[...]
solutions that support your clients’
[...]
lines of communication. Regular check-ins and updates can help manage expectations and keep clients informed about their investments.
[...]
Retention challenges often stem from mismanaged expectations, insufficient communication, and an inability to adapt to evolving client needs. By addressing these areas, agencies can significantly enhance client satisfaction and retention. Establishing strong, transparent, and responsive relationships is key to reducing churn and fostering long-term growth.",
        "position": 2
      },
      {
        "url": "https://stateofseo.com/how-a-12-person-web-agency-lost-40-revenue-overnight-over-a-hosting-cancellation-rule/",
        "title": "How a 12-Person Web Agency Lost 40% Revenue Overnight Over a Hosting Cancellation Rule - State of SEO",
        "description": "BrightPixel (name changed) is a 12-person web agency that manages 350 client WordPress sites, most on managed hosting plans the agency purchased in bulk and resold to clients. In Q1 the hosting provider rolled out a new cancellation policy: no prorated refunds, annual prepayments non-refundable after a 14-day window, and data held for 90 days with an export-only process tied to the provider’s proprietary tools. The change hit without meaningful notice. Within 10 days BrightPixel lost 40% of the clients that paid annual hosting in the previous quarter.
[...]
- Loss of recurring revenue: $62,000 in annual hosting revenue effectively vanished as clients demanded refunds or left.
- Operational chaos: 78 migration requests in two weeks, overwhelming the team’s capacity.
- Legal exposure: three clients threatened small-claims suits over alleged deceptive renewal notifications.
[...]
This was not a tech failure. The sites stayed up. The failure was contractual trust – clients felt trapped, unable to move their sites without technical friction or losing fees. BrightPixel had built reseller relationships without clear client-facing policies and had not anticipated a hostile shift from the upstream host.
[...]
The leadership team opted for a defensive but client-forward strategy: protect clients legally and make migration simple. They set three goals: stop churn immediately, remove friction for clients who wanted out, and build a new offering that would prevent this kind of crisis from recurring.
[...]
Typical fixes – negotiating with the host for better terms or absorbing refund costs – were short-term and risky. BrightPixel needed durable solutions that worked even if the upstream provider stayed stubborn or if a future provider made similar moves. They selected a strategy centered on contract clarity, automated migration, and a tiered refund policy.
[...]
- Sent clear, empathetic communications to every client explaining the hosting provider change, BrightPixel’s plan, and the client’s options.
- Offered immediate refunds for clients who requested cancellations within 14 days, honoring goodwill and defusing disputes.
- Prioritized top-20 clients by revenue and SLA requirements, assigning an account lead to each.
[...]
- Rolled out the client-facing contract addendum guaranteeing prorated refunds and exportable backups within 24 hours of request.
[...]
- Launched a new “BrightPixel Portable Hosting
[...]
product: monthly plans with explicit portability guarantees and a one-click migration option for future host changes.
[...]
- Implemented automated billing adjustments to reconcile previous annual payments and issue owed prorated refunds.
[...]
| Metric Before After 6 months Monthly recurring revenue from hosting $15,400 $13,920 (net of refunds and regained clients) Churn rate (annualized) 40% initial shock 6% ongoing churn Average migration time per site 4 hours 45 minutes Legal disputes 3 threatened claims 0 active claims (all resolved within 60 days) Transition fund used $0 $25,600 (covers refunds and migration costs) |
| --- |
[...]
Key financial takeaway: BrightPixel issued $37,000 in refunds but regained $28,000 of annualized revenue by rebuilding trust and converting clients to the portable hosting product. Net immediate cash hit was softened by the transition fund and a small short-term line of credit. The engine behind the recovery was speed – customers who could be migrated quickly and had a transparent refund were more likely to stay.
[...]
BrightPixel’s experience is a reminder: hosting is more than uptime numbers and panel features. It’s a contract, a trust relationship, and a liability if you outsource clarity. When upstream providers change terms, your clients will hold you responsible unless you’ve preemptively protected them. That requires practical contracts, migration automation, and a willingness to spend modest engineering and reserve dollars to preserve client trust.",
        "position": 3
      },
      {
        "url": "https://cursion.dev/blog/the-number-two-reason-clients-leave-agenciesand-how-to-fix-it",
        "title": "The Number Two Reason Clients Leave Agencies—and How to Fix It",
        "description": "Landon
Aug. 28, 2024, 4:39 p.m.
## While poor marketing results are the top reason clients leave an agency, the second most common reason is surprisingly easy to fix.
client churn in digital agencies
[...]
In the competitive world of digital agencies, client retention is crucial for long-term success. While poor marketing results are the top reason clients leave an agency, the second most common reason—one that is surprisingly easy to fix—relates to their website's performance and reliability. In this article, we'll explore why clients leave when their websites don't function as expected and introduce a simple yet effective framework called the**Testing Triad™**to help you retain more clients and grow your revenue.
[...]
## The Problem: Broken Websites Lead to Client Churn
[...]
Clients often leave their agencies because they feel their websites are "broken." This broad term can encompass a range of issues, including:
[...]
* **Performance Problems:**Slow load times, poor accessibility, or suboptimal code can frustrate users and harm a client's business.
* **Visual Inaccuracies:**Elements that don't appear as expected or align with the client's vision can lead to dissatisfaction.
* **Broken Forms and Functionality:**Forms that don't submit correctly, broken links, or other functional issues can directly impact a client's revenue.
[...]
Shockingly, over 70% of agencies lack a reliable, repeatable process to catch these issues before they affect clients. The result? More support requests, less time to take on new clients, and an increase in client churn due to unresolved website issues.
[...]
To address this issue, I developed a framework called the Testing Triad™. This framework provides a systematic approach to ensure that your clients' websites are always performing optimally, thereby reducing churn and increasing your agency's profitability. The Testing Triad™ focuses on three key areas:
[...]
Implementing this framework can help you create a new productized service that you can offer as an add-on or upsell to your clients. This not only adds revenue to your bottom line but also provides peace of mind to your clients, which can lead to more referrals and a stronger client-agency relationship.
[...]
Performance testing is about ensuring that your client's website operates smoothly and efficiently. This involves monitoring key metrics like load times, accessibility, and overall code optimization. Regular performance checks help you identify and address issues before they become major problems for your clients.
[...]
Structural testing ensures that the underlying HTML and visual rendering of the website remain consistent after updates. This step is crucial because even minor changes in the website's structure can lead to unexpected visual or functional issues.
[...]
. This includes testing
[...]
By implementing the Testing Triad™, your agency can proactively address website issues before they escalate into client complaints. This not only reduces the number of support requests but also strengthens your relationship with clients by demonstrating your commitment to maintaining their websites' performance and reliability.
[...]
Moreover, offering this as a productized service—either as an add-on or an upsell—can significantly boost your agency's revenue. Clients are more likely to stay with an agency that provides peace of mind through proactive maintenance, and the structured approach of the Testing Triad™ can set your agency apart from competitors.
[...]
The number two reason clients leave agencies—feeling that their websites are broken—is entirely preventable with the right approach. By adopting the Testing Triad™ framework, you can ensure your clients' websites are always performing at their best, reducing churn and increasing your agency's profitability. Start implementing these practices today to build stronger client relationships and create new revenue streams for your agency.",
        "position": 4
      },
      {
        "url": "https://www.prolimehost.com/blogs/customer-fallout-how-do-you-handle-churn/",
        "title": "Customer Fallout – How Do You Handle Churn? | ProlimeHost",
        "description": "I’ve thought about this many times even on things not web hosting industry related. Other than poor customer service or repeated outages, I think high customer fallout results from continuing to charge long term clients higher prices than you’re offering to new prospects.
[...]
Plus, even if you don’t advertise, and let’s say, your client has been with you for years, and your competition is offering better pricing for the same service, some clients will just opt to move on without complaining.
[...]
The current host thinks their clients are happy until they get that, ‘I want to terminate my service’ notice. Is this complacency on the part of the host, or is that just the nature of a competitive marketplace? I think it’s a bit of both. Hosts can hardly afford customer churn in today’s marketplace.
[...]
I do see reviews on web hosting forums where clients will stay with a provider for years on end, but more often than not, businesses migrate to other service providers for a myriad of reasons, not only related to price.
[...]
The first thing you need
[...]
realize as a service provider is that
[...]
word of the day.
[...]
The services they first purchased may have met their hosting requirements at the time, but they either outgrew those, need to scale back because of budget cuts or any of a number of other reasons.
[...]
This doesn’t mean that you’ve done anything wrong. You just haven’t done everything right, meaning you didn’t maintain communications with your clients to keep pace with their requirements.
[...]
That also doesn’t mean if they terminate their services with you that they’ll never come back. Sometimes, they realize that the grass isn’t really greener elsewhere.
[...]
Clients most likely price shopped when they found you, so it would be unrealistic to think that they wouldn’t continue to price shop, even if you believe they’re completely happy with your services.
[...]
Let’s say your hosting company advertises aggressively, but their promotions are for new clients only. What typically occurs is existing clients will see those ads, resulting in lots of calls from them asking for the same deal. Does your hosting company first tell them it’s for new clients only and cave in only if they complain? At that point, even if the hosting company gave them the same deal, it’ll leave a sour taste in their mouth going forward.
[...]
Some companies will give promotions to existing clients and new clients, but that’s rare. What you’ll typically find is that once you’re locked into specific plans and pricing, that’ll never change, even if you’re with the same company for years on end.
[...]
On the flip side, as a company, you can’t afford to lose money on clients, unless there is perceived value in promotional loss leaders. Companies need to look at lifetime asset valuations. How long do they normally retain existing clientele?
[...]
Another issue that leads to customer churn in the hosting industry is the popularity of WordPress. Why? An alarming number of WordPress websites are not kept up-to-date, meaning their themes and plugins are not regular updated. This leads to security loop holes and compromised sites.
[...]
Quite often, the hosting provider is consequently blamed for not locking down their servers securely. In reality, no matter how securely a server is locked down, if you’re running old unpatched software content management systems on your websites, you open yourself to malware attacks, and migrating to another hosting provider won’t help. The vulnerabilities in your site will migrate with you.
[...]
Will lowering pricing keep churn under check? Not normally. Why? Pricing needs to be at levels that produces enough revenue to provide comprehensive levels of support, and still turn a profit. Clients that leave based on price alone are quite often the same ones that return when their new provider falls flat responding to and resolving support tickets.",
        "position": 5
      }
    ]
  }
}
Now let me get the specific product pages for key pricing details.

{
  "results": [
    {
      "url": "https://botpress.com/pricing",
      "title": "Botpress Pricing | Pay-as-You-Go",
      "content": "# Botpress Pricing Summary

## Plans Overview

### Pay-as-you-go ($0/mo + AI Spend)
- **Visual building studio** – drag-and-drop flow builder
- **Free monthly AI credit** – $5/mo included
- **Community support** – forums, docs, Discord

### Plus ($79/mo billed annually / $89/mo monthly)
All Pay-as-you-go features, plus:
- **Human handoff** – seamless agent-to-human transfer
- **Conversation insights** – AI-powered sentiment analysis & outcomes
- **Watermark removal** – remove "Powered by Botpress" branding
- **Proactive chat bubble** – auto-greet website visitors
- **Visual knowledge base indexing** – images, charts, graphs
- **Technical support via live chat**

### Team ($445/mo billed annually / $495/mo monthly)
All Plus features, plus:
- **Role-based access control** – user roles & permissions
- **Real-time collaboration** – simultaneous editing in Studio
- **Custom analytics** – custom dashboards & metrics
- **Advanced support** – priority support + Customer Success manager

### Managed ($1,245/mo billed annually / $1,495/mo monthly)
Custom AI agents built & maintained by Botpress experts. Includes all Team features, plus:
- Custom development & ongoing maintenance
- System integration (CRM, support tools, APIs)
- Team training sessions
- Discovery workshop & conversation design strategy
- Fully branded conversational experiences
- Secure production deployment
- Dedicated Success Manager
- Monthly strategy & performance review calls
- Continuous agent monitoring & improvements

### Enterprise (Custom pricing)
All Team features, plus:
- **Whiteglove onboarding** – concierge-style setup
- **Custom workspace limits** – negotiate message/bot/storage limits
- **Dedicated support manager** – single point of contact

---

## AI Spend Details

> **"AI Spend is the budget you allocate for your bot's usage of LLMs. Charged at provider cost without markup."**

- LLM usage billed at provider price (no markup)
- Free $5 monthly AI credit included
- Custom spending cap available
- **Monthly AI Spend limits:**
  - Pay-as-you-go & Plus: **$100/mo**
  - Team: **$500/mo**
  - Enterprise: Custom

---

## Add-ons & Limits

| Feature | PAYG | Plus | Team | Overage Cost |
|---------|------|------|------|--------------|
| **Incoming Messages & Events** | 500/mo | 5,000/mo | 50,000/mo | $20/5,000 messages |

{"file_path": "/root/.hermes/hermes-agent/research_white_label_churn_latam.md", "content": "# Research Report: White-label Platforms, Post-Sale AI Support Bots & Churn/Fidelización para Agencias Web LATAM

---

## 1. PLATAFORMAS WHITE-LABEL PARA AGENCIAS

### 1.1 HOSTING

#### Cloudways Partner Program
- **URL:** https://www.cloudways.com/en/reseller-hosting.php
- **Model:** Revender hosting administrado sobre DigitalOcean, AWS, GCP, Vultr, Linode
- **Costos base:** Desde $14/mes (1GB RAM, 1 core, 25GB storage) hasta $342/mes
- **Programa Partner (gratis):** Tiers Bronze (<$100/mes gasto), Silver ($100-$499), Gold ($500-$2,499), Platinum ($2,500+)
- **Beneficios:** White-label completo (dashboard, dominio, logo propio), 7% comisión por referidos + $30/referido (hasta 10% + $50 en Platinum)
- **Volumen discounts 2026:** 10% off en $2K/mes, 15% en $5K/mes, 20% en $10K/mes
- **Margen típico agencia:** 45-65% (con volumen)
- **Sin mínimo:** $0 mínimo, pay-as-you-go por hora
- **URL Agencia:** https://www.cloudways.com/blog/agency-partnership-program/

#### SiteGround White Label (Agency Program)
- **URL:** https://siteground.com/agencies
- **Planes:** GrowBig ($4.99/mo intro, renueva $29.99/mo), GoGeek ($7.99/mo intro, renueva $44.99/mo), Cloud (desde $100/mo)
- **White-label:** Solo en GoGeek y Cloud — Site Tools sin branding SiteGround + Private DNS
- **Paquetes personalizados:** En Cloud se puede definir recursos por sitio (CPU, RAM, espacio)
- **Programa Agencia gratuito:** Sin costo de afiliación. 3 meses gratis de prueba.
- **Modelo:** Ideal para agencias que quieren hosting compartido administrado con marca propia. No hay comisión por referidos directa como Cloudways.

#### DigitalOcean Partner Pod
- **URL:** https://www.digitalocean.com/partners/pod
- **Tiers:** Registered (5% descuento + 10% referral), Engaged (15% descuento, requiere $100K anuales), Strategic (25% descuento, requiere $1M+)
- **Modelos:** Advisory (referidos), Business (reventa), Technology (ISV)
- **Sin costo de entrada:** Se puede empezar con cuenta regular y usar API/WHMCS para automatizar
- **Margen:** 5-25% según tier. Menor margen que Cloudways pero más control de infraestructura

### 1.2 EMAIL PROFESIONAL

#### MXroute (White Label Reseller)
- **URL:** https://mxroute.com/reseller-info.html
- **Planes reseller:** Reseller75 (75GB, $30/trimestre = $10/mes), Reseller150 (150GB, $45/trimestre = $15/mes), Reseller200 (200GB, $25/mes)
- **Características white-label:** Dominio propio para login (mailadmin.tudominio.com), personalización completa del panel (logo, colores, tema), cuentas separadas por cliente
- **Modelo:** Ilimitado en dominios y cuentas de correo. Límite por almacenamiento.
- **Margen potencial:** Compra a $10/mes, revende cada cuenta de correo a $3-5/mes/cliente. Con 10+ clientes, margen de 60-80%.
- **Planes regulares (para referencia):** Desde $59/año (10GB) — buen benchmark de precio retail
- **Docs:** https://docs.mxroute.com/docs/presales/reseller-differences.html

#### Zoho White Label (Partnership Program)
- **URL:** https://www.zoho.com/partners/workplace-partnership-program.html
- **URL Mail Partners:** https://www.zoho.com/mail/email-partnership-program.html
- **Modelo:** Value-Added Reseller (VAR) — sin costo de afiliación
- **Planes Zoho Mail:** Mail Lite ($1.25/user/mes anual), Mail Premium ($4/user/mes anual), Workplace Professional ($8/user/mes anual)
- **White-label:** Disponible en Premium y Workplace (logo propio, URL personalizada)
- **Comisiones:** Pricing no público — se negocia descuento mayorista para revender
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que quieren email + productividad (Docs, Meet, Cliq) con marca blanca

#### Titan Email (by GoDaddy/Newfold Digital)
- **URL Partners:** https://titan.email/partners/
- **Modelo:** No venden directo al público — solo a través de partners (hosters, agencias, registrars)
- **Precio retail típico:** $2.08/mes (10GB), $3.75/mes (50GB), $6.67/mes (100GB) por buzón
- **Precio partner:** No público — se negocia por volumen. Ej. resellers ofrecen desde $1.95/buzón
- **Beneficios:** CRM integrado, campañas email marketing, booking, AI Smart Write
- **Casos destacados:** GoDaddy aumentó ARPU 76% con Titan. HostGator Brazil mejoró NPS 12 pts.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias con +50 clientes de email. Se integra via API/iFrame.

### 1.3 SEGURIDAD WEB

#### Sucuri Partner Program
- **URL:** https://sucuri.net/partners/
- **Modelo:** Partner con descuentos por volumen. White-label completo.
- **Precios retail:** Basic ($229/año), Pro ($339/año), Business ($549/año), Multi-Site (desde $999.98/año)
- **Precios mayoristas:** No públicos — contacto con ventas. Volumen: up to 20% off en 10+ sitios.
- **Margen potencial:** 20-40% sobre precio retail
- **Programa Agencia:** https://sucuri.net/customers/implement-sucuri/ (descuentos volumen para 5+ sitios)
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que quieren revender firewall WAF + limpieza malware + CDN

#### Cloudflare Partner Programs
- **URL:** https://www.cloudflare.com/partners/
- **Programas:**
  - **PowerUP Partner Program:** Resell, Manage, Distribute, Consult
  - **Self-Serve Agency Program (Beta):** Dashboard multi-tenant, billing centralizado, planes con descuento
  - **URL Agency:** https://www.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-partners-self-serve-program-closed-beta/
- **Planes disponibles (Agency):** CF_FREE, CF_PRO_20_20 (~$20/mes), CF_BIZ (~$200/mes)
- **Margen:** Descuento no público — se negocia según volumen
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que ya usan Cloudflare y quieren revender Pro/Business con margen

### 1.4 MONITOREO

#### UptimeRobot White Label
- **URL:** https://uptimerobot.com/pricing/
- **Planes:** Free (50 monitores, no comercial desde Oct 2024), Solo ($9/mes anual, 10-50 monitores), Team ($38/mes anual, 100 monitores), Enterprise ($69/mes anual, 200+ monitores)
- **White-label status pages:** Incluido en Team y Enterprise — dominio propio, sin branding UptimeRobot
- **Margen:** Team a $38/mes, se puede revender a $79-99/mes como "monitoreo administrado"
- **Nota importante:** Free plan prohibido para uso comercial desde Oct 2024

#### Better Uptime (Better Stack)
- **URL:** https://betteruptime.com/pricing
- **Pricing:** $29/mes por responder (anual), incluye 10 monitores + 1 status page
- **White-label:** $250/mes por página (remover "Powered by Better Stack")
- **Monitores adicionales:** $21/mes por 50
- **Modelo:** Per-responder (se multiplica por equipo)
- **Comparativa:** Más caro que UptimeRobot pero con incident management + on-call incluido
- **Alternativa más barata:** UptimeSignal ($10/mes flat, monitores ilimitados)

### 1.5 TABLA COMPARATIVA DE MÁRGENES

| Servicio | Costo al mes (aprox.) | Precio reventa típico | Margen bruto |
|---|---|---|---|
| Cloudways (50 sites) | $84/servidor DigitalOcean | $29-49/site/mes | 45-65% |
| SiteGround GoGeek | $7.99 intro / $44.99 renovación | $15-30/site/mes | 40-60% |
| MXroute Reseller75 | $10/mes (75GB total) | $3-5/cuenta/mes | 60-80% |
| Zoho Mail Premium | $4/user/mes (mayorista) | $7-10/user/mes | 40-60% |
| Titan Email | ~$1.50-2/buzón/mes (partner) | $3-6/buzón/mes | 50-70% |
| Sucuri Pro | $28/mes (volumen) | $48/mes retail | 35-45% |
| UptimeRobot Team | $38/mes | $79-99/mes | 50-60% |

---

## 2. MINI-BOTS DE SOPORTE POST-VENTA

### 2.1 Botpress
- **URL:** https://botpress.com/
- **URL Pricing:** https://botpress.com/pricing
- **URL PostgreSQL Integration:** https://botpress.com/integrations/postgresql
- **URL Knowledge Bases:** https://botpress.com/features/knowledge-bases
- **Modelo:** Open-source + cloud SaaS con integración nativa a PostgreSQL (lectura directa de BD de productos)
- **Planes:** Pay-as-you-go ($0 + $5 AI credit), Plus ($79/mes anual, 5,000 mensajes), Team ($445/mes anual, 50,000 mensajes), Managed ($1,245/mes anual), Enterprise (custom)
- **Knowledge Base:** Importa URLs, PDFs, CSVs, tablas — bot responde preguntas de productos automáticamente
- **Integración Supabase/Postgres:** Conexión directa a PostgreSQL para query data en tiempo real
- **Caso de uso perfecto:** Bot que lee tabla de productos/precios del cliente desde Supabase y responde FAQs
- **AI Spend adicional:** $100/mes max (PAYG/Plus), $500/mes (Team). Sin markup en LLMs.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias con clientes medianos que necesitan bot sofisticado con BD propia

### 2.2 Tidio (Lyro AI Agent)
- **URL:** https://tidio.com/
- **URL Pricing:** https://tidio.com/pricing
- **Modelo:** SaaS chatbot + live chat + ticketing
- **Planes:** Free (50 conversaciones/mes), Starter ($24.17/mes, 100 conversaciones), Growth ($49.17/mes, 250+), Plus ($749/mes), Premium (custom)
- **Lyro AI Agent standalone:** Desde $32.50/mes por 50 conversaciones AI
- **Funcionalidad FAQ:** Lyro aprende de tu contenido de soporte — puede resolver hasta 67% de preguntas
- **Integración DB:** No tiene integración directa a PostgreSQL/Supabase como Botpress, pero se puede conectar via Zapier/Make
- **Ideal para:** Agencias pequeñas, implementación rápida (< 1 hora), buena relación costo-beneficio

### 2.3 ManyChat
- **URL:** https://manychat.com/
- **URL Pricing:** https://manychat.com/pricing
- **URL AI Knowledge:** https://help.manychat.com/hc/en-us/articles/25626595060124-Manychat-AI-Knowledge
- **Modelo:** Plataforma de chat marketing (Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger)
- **Precios:** Desde $29/mo (2,500 contactos activos, 3 canales), $69/mo, $139/mo
- **AI Knowledge Base:** Agrega texto plano y URLs públicas. NO soporta PDFs, imágenes, ni BD externas.
- **Limitación:** No integración directa a PostgreSQL/Supabase. Solo URLs públicas y texto manual.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que usan Instagram/WhatsApp para soporte, NO para leer BD de productos

### 2.4 Chatwoot (Open Source/Gratuito)
- **URL:** https://www.chatwoot.com/
- **URL Self-Hosted Pricing:** https://www.chatwoot.com/pricing/self-hosted-plans/
- **Modelo:** Open source (MIT License) — auto-hospedado o cloud
- **Precios Self-hosted:** Community ($0/agente/mes), Premium Support ($19/agente/mes), Enterprise ($99/agente/mes)
- **Captain AI:** Reply suggestions, conversation summaries, AI assistant (usa OpenAI GPT). Solo en Premium/Enterprise.
- **Integración DB:** Se puede conectar PostgreSQL a través de API/webhooks, pero no es nativo.
- **Requisitos servidor:** 4GB RAM, 2 CPU, PostgreSQL, Redis, 60GB SSD
- **Lo mejor:** Es GRATIS (Community Edition). Sin límite de agentes. Ideal para bootstrap.
- **Limitación:** El AI chatbot no es tan plug-and-play como Tidio o Botpress. Requiere desarrollo.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias con stack técnico que quieren control total + ahorro extremo

### 2.5 TABLA COMPARATIVA CHATBOTS FAQ

| Plataforma | Costo mínimo | Integración PostgreSQL/Supabase | AI FAQ automático | Ideal para |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Botpress** | $0 (500 msgs/mes) | ✅ Nativa (PostgreSQL) | ✅ Knowledge Base con tablas | Clientes medianos con BD de productos |
| **Tidio Lyro** | $24.17/mes | ❌ (via Zapier) | ✅ Aprende de contenido soporte | Implementación rápida, SMBs |
| **ManyChat** | $29/mes | ❌ (solo URLs/texto) | ✅ Knowledge Base texto/URLs | Soporte via Instagram/WhatsApp |
| **Chatwoot** | $0 (self-hosted) | ⚠️ (via API manual) | ⚠️ Captain AI (Premium+) | Agencias técnicas, presupuesto cero |

---

## 3. CHURN EN AGENCIAS WEB LATAM

### 3.1 ESTADÍSTICAS CLAVE

- **62%** de agencias reportan perder clientes por temas técnicos, NO por desacuerdos creativos o presupuesto (Agency Analytics 2024)
- **56%** de clientes de hosting se van por precio (Web Hosting Trends Report 2026, CloudLinux)
- **41%** se van a plataformas SaaS como Wix, Shopify, Squarespace
- **12%** churn rate en el primer año para agencias digitales (IT sector benchmark)
- **29%** se van por rendimiento del sitio lento
- **25%** por funcionalidades faltantes vs competidores
- **19%** por incidentes de seguridad (malware, hacks)
- **18%** por mala experiencia de soporte

### 3.2 RAZONES PRINCIPALES POR LAS QUE CLIENTES CANCELAN HOSTING/MANTENIMIENTO

1. **Precio (56%)** — Encuentran hosting más barato (Hostinger, GoDaddy promos, DonWeb en LATAM)
2. **Migración a SaaS (41%)** — Clientes migran a Wix, Shopify, Squarespace por simplicidad
3. **Rendimiento lento (29%)** — Sitios que cargan en 6s vs 2s = pierden 32% de leads
4. **No ven el valor** — El cliente siente que "la web ya está hecha" y no necesita mantenimiento mensual
5. **Falta de comunicación** — 19% se van por mala comunicación en emergencias
6. **Soporte reactivo en vez de proactivo** — Agencias que solo responden cuando algo se rompe
7. **Outgrow** — Cliente crece y necesita features que la agencia no ofrece (e-commerce, multi-idoma)
8. **Falta de reporting** — No reciben informes de rendimiento, uptime, tráfico

### 3.3 DATOS ESPECÍFICOS LATAM

- **DonWeb (Argentina)** registró ~2,947 pérdidas de dominios en 30 días (fuente whoare.io)
- **Cloudflare LATAM** ~875 pérdidas en mismo período
- **Hostinger LATAM** ~1,135 pérdidas
- El mercado LATAM es altamente sensible al precio. Promociones agresivas de Hostinger, GoDaddy, DonWeb generan mucho churn.
- **Barreras bajas de salida:** En LATAM muchos clientes no firman contratos anuales, pagan mes a mes.

### 3.4 CÓMO EL HOSTING IMPACTA EL CHURN
- Agencias que usan shared hosting barato: **68%** retención (vs 91% con managed WordPress hosting)
- Al migrar a managed hosting: client lifetime value sube de $24K a $42K
- Tiempo en soporte técnico se reduce **75%**
- Las agencias ahorran ~$25,000/año al reducir churn con mejor hosting (fuente: TopSyde case study)

---

## 4. PLANES DE FIDELIZACIÓN PARA AGENCIAS EN MERCADOS PEQUEÑOS

### 4.1 BUNDLES ANUALES CON DESCUENTO

- **Modelo probado:** Ofrecer 2 meses gratis si pagan el año completo de mantenimiento/hosting
- **Ejemplo:** Mantenimiento mensual $49/mes → $490/año (ahorran ~$98 vs $588)
- **Dominio + hosting + email:** Bundle anual $199/año (vs $250+ por separado)
- **Referencia:** Hosting Plus Colombia recomienda contratos anuales para reducir churn
- **InMotion Hosting (es):** https://www.inmotionhosting.com/es/blog/agency-recurring-revenue-model/

### 4.2 INFORMES MENSUALES DE RENDIMIENTO (REPORTING AUTOMÁTICO)

- **Qué incluir:** Uptime % del mes, velocidad de carga, tráfico estimado, backups realizados, incidentes resueltos
- **Herramientas para automátizar:**
  - **UptimeRobot** → Status pages white-label embedidas en dashboard del cliente
  - **Cloudways** → Reportes de rendimiento integrados
  - **Better Uptime** → Reportes SLA automáticos
- **Valor percibido:** El informe demuestra trabajo continuo. Combate "no veo el valor del mantenimiento"
- **Frecuencia:** Mensual + resumen trimestral con recomendaciones

### 4.3 UPGRADE PATHS (DE LANDING PAGE A TIENDA COMPLETA)

- **Landing Page ($49/mes):** Hosting, 1 página, SSL, email básico
- **Sitio Corporativo ($99/mes):** 5 páginas, blog, formulario, SEO básico, informes mensuales
- **Tienda Online ($199/mes):** E-commerce (WooCommerce/Shopify), catálogo de productos, carrito, pagos
- **Premium ($399/mes):** Tienda + CRM integrado + chatbot AI + reporting avanzado + horas de desarrollo

### 4.4 ESTRATEGIAS ADICIONALES

- **Programa de referidos:** Descuento para el referente y el nuevo cliente (ej. 1 mes gratis)
- **Automatización de dunning:** Recuperar churn involuntario (tarjeta vencida) — puede recuperar 20-40% de estos casos
- **Soporte proactivo:** Llamada trimestral de revisión, no solo email
- **Educación al cliente:** Tutoriales, webinars de cómo usar su web mejor
- **Encuestas NPS:** Detectar clientes insatisfechos antes de que cancelen
- **Kalyma Studio (España):** https://kalymastudio.es/soluciones/mantenimiento-wordpress-marca-blanca/ — Planes de mantenimiento white-label para agencias, desde bolsas de 10h por €480

### 4.5 MODELO DE INGRESOS RECURRENTES RECOMENDADO

```
Plan Básico:    $49/mes  → Hosting + SSL + backups + soporte email
Plan Pro:       $99/mes  → Hosting + mantenimiento WP + informes + 2h cambios
Plan Premium:   $199/mes → Hosting premium + chatbot FAQ + SEO + 5h cambios + reporting
Plan Tienda:    $299/mes → Todo Premium + e-commerce + integraciones + soporte prioritario
```

**Estrategia de margen:**
- Hosting Cloudways: ~$10-30/mes costo → revender en bundle a $49-99/mes
- Email MXroute: ~$10/mes (75GB) → revender cuentas a $3-5 cada una
- Chatbot Tidio: ~$25-50/mes → incluir en plan Pro/Premium como valor agregado
- Monitoreo UptimeRobot: ~$38/mes → revender acceso a status page como feature premium

---

## 5. URLs RESUMEN

| Categoría | Recurso | URL |
|---|---|---|
| Hosting | Cloudways Partner Program | https://www.cloudways.com/blog/agency-partnership-program/ |
| Hosting | SiteGround Agency Program | https://siteground.com/agencies |
| Hosting | DigitalOcean Partner Pod | https://www.digitalocean.com/partners/pod |
| Email | MXroute Reseller | https://mxroute.com/reseller-info.html |
| Email | Zoho Mail Partnership | https://www.zoho.com/mail/email-partnership-program.html |
| Email | Titan Partners | https://titan.email/partners/ |
| Seguridad | Sucuri Partner | https://sucuri.net/partners/ |
| Seguridad | Cloudflare Agency Program | https://www.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-partners-self-serve-program-closed-beta/ |
| Monitoreo | UptimeRobot | https://uptimerobot.com/pricing/ |
| Monitoreo | Better Uptime | https://betteruptime.com/pricing |
| Chatbots | Botpress | https://botpress.com/pricing |
| Chatbots | Tidio | https://tidio.com/pricing |
| Chatbots | Chatwoot Self-Hosted | https://www.chatwoot.com/pricing/self-hosted-plans/ |
| Chatbots | ManyChat | https://manychat.com/pricing |
| Churn | Web Hosting Trends 2026 | https://cloudlinux.com/resources/web-hosting-trends-report-2026/download-full-report |
| Churn | Agency Client Retention | https://topsyde.com/blog/agency-client-retention-hosting |
| Churn | Why Agencies Lose Clients | https://whitelabelninja.com/why-do-most-digital-agencies-lose-clients-after-the-first-year/ |
| Fidelización | InMotion - Ingresos Recurrentes (ES) | https://www.inmotionhosting.com/es/blog/agency-recurring-revenue-model/ |
| Fidelización | dinahosting - Retención (ES) | https://dinahosting.com/blog/retencion-clientes-guia/ |
| Fidelización | Kalyma Mantenimiento WP WL | https://kalymastudio.es/soluciones/mantenimiento-wordpress-marca-blanca/ |

{"command": "cat > /root/.hermes/hermes-agent/research_white_label_churn_latam.md << 'ENDOFFILE'
# Research Report: White-label Platforms, Post-Sale AI Support Bots & Churn/Fidelización para Agencias Web LATAM

---

## 1. PLATAFORMAS WHITE-LABEL PARA AGENCIAS

### 1.1 HOSTING

#### Cloudways Partner Program
- **URL:** https://www.cloudways.com/en/reseller-hosting.php
- **Model:** Revender hosting administrado sobre DigitalOcean, AWS, GCP, Vultr, Linode
- **Costos base:** Desde $14/mes (1GB RAM, 1 core, 25GB storage) hasta $342/mes
- **Programa Partner (gratis):** Tiers Bronze (<$100/mes gasto), Silver ($100-$499), Gold ($500-$2,499), Platinum ($2,500+)
- **Beneficios:** White-label completo (dashboard, dominio, logo propio), 7% comisión por referidos + $30/referido (hasta 10% + $50 en Platinum)
- **Volumen discounts 2026:** 10% off en $2K/mes, 15% en $5K/mes, 20% en $10K/mes
- **Margen típico agencia:** 45-65% (con volumen)
- **Sin mínimo:** $0 mínimo, pay-as-you-go por hora
- **URL Agencia:** https://www.cloudways.com/blog/agency-partnership-program/

#### SiteGround White Label (Agency Program)
- **URL:** https://siteground.com/agencies
- **Planes:** GrowBig ($4.99/mo intro, renueva $29.99/mo), GoGeek ($7.99/mo intro, renueva $44.99/mo), Cloud (desde $100/mo)
- **White-label:** Solo en GoGeek y Cloud — Site Tools sin branding SiteGround + Private DNS
- **Paquetes personalizados:** En Cloud se puede definir recursos por sitio (CPU, RAM, espacio)
- **Programa Agencia gratuito:** Sin costo de afiliación. 3 meses gratis de prueba.
- **Modelo:** Ideal para agencias que quieren hosting compartido administrado con marca propia.

#### DigitalOcean Partner Pod
- **URL:** https://www.digitalocean.com/partners/pod
- **Tiers:** Registered (5% descuento + 10% referral), Engaged (15% descuento, requiere $100K anuales), Strategic (25% descuento, requiere $1M+)
- **Modelos:** Advisory (referidos), Business (reventa), Technology (ISV)
- **Sin costo de entrada:** Se puede empezar con cuenta regular y usar API/WHMCS para automatizar
- **Margen:** 5-25% según tier. Menor margen que Cloudways pero más control de infraestructura

### 1.2 EMAIL PROFESIONAL

#### MXroute (White Label Reseller)
- **URL:** https://mxroute.com/reseller-info.html
- **Planes reseller:** Reseller75 (75GB, $30/trimestre = $10/mes), Reseller150 (150GB, $45/trimestre = $15/mes), Reseller200 (200GB, $25/mes)
- **Características white-label:** Dominio propio para login (mailadmin.tudominio.com), personalización completa del panel (logo, colores, tema), cuentas separadas por cliente
- **Modelo:** Ilimitado en dominios y cuentas de correo. Límite por almacenamiento.
- **Margen potencial:** Compra a $10/mes, revende cada cuenta de correo a $3-5/mes/cliente. Con 10+ clientes, margen de 60-80%.
- **Planes regulares (para referencia):** Desde $59/año (10GB) — buen benchmark de precio retail
- **Docs:** https://docs.mxroute.com/docs/presales/reseller-differences.html

#### Zoho White Label (Partnership Program)
- **URL:** https://www.zoho.com/partners/workplace-partnership-program.html
- **URL Mail Partners:** https://www.zoho.com/mail/email-partnership-program.html
- **Modelo:** Value-Added Reseller (VAR) — sin costo de afiliación
- **Planes Zoho Mail:** Mail Lite ($1.25/user/mes anual), Mail Premium ($4/user/mes anual), Workplace Professional ($8/user/mes anual)
- **White-label:** Disponible en Premium y Workplace (logo propio, URL personalizada)
- **Comisiones:** Pricing no público — se negocia descuento mayorista para revender
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que quieren email + productividad (Docs, Meet, Cliq) con marca blanca

#### Titan Email (by GoDaddy/Newfold Digital)
- **URL Partners:** https://titan.email/partners/
- **Modelo:** No venden directo al público — solo a través de partners (hosters, agencias, registrars)
- **Precio retail típico:** $2.08/mes (10GB), $3.75/mes (50GB), $6.67/mes (100GB) por buzón
- **Precio partner:** No público — se negocia por volumen. Ej. resellers ofrecen desde $1.95/buzón
- **Beneficios:** CRM integrado, campañas email marketing, booking, AI Smart Write
- **Casos destacados:** GoDaddy aumentó ARPU 76% con Titan. HostGator Brazil mejoró NPS 12 pts.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias con +50 clientes de email. Se integra via API/iFrame.

### 1.3 SEGURIDAD WEB

#### Sucuri Partner Program
- **URL:** https://sucuri.net/partners/
- **Modelo:** Partner con descuentos por volumen. White-label completo.
- **Precios retail:** Basic ($229/año), Pro ($339/año), Business ($549/año), Multi-Site (desde $999.98/año)
- **Precios mayoristas:** No públicos — contacto con ventas. Volumen: up to 20% off en 10+ sitios.
- **Margen potencial:** 20-40% sobre precio retail
- **Programa Agencia:** https://sucuri.net/customers/implement-sucuri/ (descuentos volumen para 5+ sitios)
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que quieren revender firewall WAF + limpieza malware + CDN

#### Cloudflare Partner Programs
- **URL:** https://www.cloudflare.com/partners/
- **Programas:**
  - **PowerUP Partner Program:** Resell, Manage, Distribute, Consult
  - **Self-Serve Agency Program (Beta):** Dashboard multi-tenant, billing centralizado, planes con descuento
  - **URL Agency:** https://www.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-partners-self-serve-program-closed-beta/
- **Planes disponibles (Agency):** CF_FREE, CF_PRO_20_20 (~$20/mes), CF_BIZ (~$200/mes)
- **Margen:** Descuento no público — se negocia según volumen
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que ya usan Cloudflare y quieren revender Pro/Business con margen

### 1.4 MONITOREO

#### UptimeRobot White Label
- **URL:** https://uptimerobot.com/pricing/
- **Planes:** Free (50 monitores, no comercial desde Oct 2024), Solo ($9/mes anual, 10-50 monitores), Team ($38/mes anual, 100 monitores), Enterprise ($69/mes anual, 200+ monitores)
- **White-label status pages:** Incluido en Team y Enterprise — dominio propio, sin branding UptimeRobot
- **Margen:** Team a $38/mes, se puede revender a $79-99/mes como "monitoreo administrado"
- **Nota importante:** Free plan prohibido para uso comercial desde Oct 2024

#### Better Uptime (Better Stack)
- **URL:** https://betteruptime.com/pricing
- **Pricing:** $29/mes por responder (anual), incluye 10 monitores + 1 status page
- **White-label:** $250/mes por página (remover "Powered by Better Stack")
- **Monitores adicionales:** $21/mes por 50
- **Modelo:** Per-responder (se multiplica por equipo)
- **Alternativa más barata:** UptimeSignal ($10/mes flat, monitores ilimitados)

### 1.5 TABLA COMPARATIVA DE MÁRGENES

| Servicio | Costo al mes (aprox.) | Precio reventa típico | Margen bruto |
|---|---|---|---|
| Cloudways (50 sites) | $84/servidor DigitalOcean | $29-49/site/mes | 45-65% |
| SiteGround GoGeek | $7.99 intro / $44.99 renovación | $15-30/site/mes | 40-60% |
| MXroute Reseller75 | $10/mes (75GB total) | $3-5/cuenta/mes | 60-80% |
| Zoho Mail Premium | $4/user/mes (mayorista) | $7-10/user/mes | 40-60% |
| Titan Email | ~$1.50-2/buzón/mes (partner) | $3-6/buzón/mes | 50-70% |
| Sucuri Pro | $28/mes (volumen) | $48/mes retail | 35-45% |
| UptimeRobot Team | $38/mes | $79-99/mes | 50-60% |

- **19%** por incidentes de seguridad (malware, hacks)
- **18%** por mala experiencia de soporte

### 3.2 RAZONES PRINCIPALES POR LAS QUE CLIENTES CANCELAN HOSTING/MANTENIMIENTO

1. **Precio (56%)** — Encuentran hosting más barato (Hostinger, GoDaddy promos, DonWeb en LATAM)
2. **Migración a SaaS (41%)** — Clientes migran a Wix, Shopify, Squarespace por simplicidad
3. **Rendimiento lento (29%)** — Sitios que cargan en 6s vs 2s = pierden 32% de leads
4. **No ven el valor** — El cliente siente que "la web ya está hecha" y no necesita mantenimiento mensual
5. **Falta de comunicación** — 19% se van por mala comunicación en emergencias
6. **Soporte reactivo en vez de proactivo** — Agencias que solo responden cuando algo se rompe
7. **Outgrow** — Cliente crece y necesita features que la agencia no ofrece (e-commerce, multi-idioma)
8. **Falta de reporting** — No reciben informes de rendimiento, uptime, tráfico

### 3.3 DATOS ESPECÍFICOS LATAM

- **DonWeb (Argentina)** registró ~2,947 pérdidas de dominios en 30 días (fuente whoare.io)
- **Cloudflare LATAM** ~875 pérdidas en mismo período
- **Hostinger LATAM** ~1,135 pérdidas
- El mercado LATAM es altamente sensible al precio. Promociones agresivas de Hostinger, GoDaddy, DonWeb generan mucho churn.
- **Barreras bajas de salida:** En LATAM muchos clientes no firman contratos anuales, pagan mes a mes.

### 3.4 CÓMO EL HOSTING IMPACTA EL CHURN
- Agencias que usan shared hosting barato: **68%** retención (vs 91% con managed WordPress hosting)
- Al migrar a managed hosting: client lifetime value sube de $24K a $42K
- Tiempo en soporte técnico se reduce **75%**
- Las agencias ahorran ~$25,000/año al reducir churn con mejor hosting (fuente: TopSyde case study)

---

## 4. PLANES DE FIDELIZACIÓN PARA AGENCIAS EN MERCADOS PEQUEÑOS

### 4.1 BUNDLES ANUALES CON DESCUENTO

- **Modelo probado:** Ofrecer 2 meses gratis si pagan el año completo de mantenimiento/hosting
- **Ejemplo:** Mantenimiento mensual $49/mes -> $490/año (ahorran ~$98 vs $588)
- **Dominio + hosting + email:** Bundle anual $199/año (vs $250+ por separado)
- **Referencia:** Hosting Plus Colombia recomienda contratos anuales para reducir churn
- **InMotion Hosting (es):** https://www.inmotionhosting.com/es/blog/agency-recurring-revenue-model/

### 4.2 INFORMES MENSUALES DE RENDIMIENTO (REPORTING AUTOMÁTICO)

- **Qué incluir:** Uptime % del mes, velocidad de carga, tráfico estimado, backups realizados, incidentes resueltos
- **Herramientas para automatizar:**
  - **UptimeRobot** -> Status pages white-label embedidas en dashboard del cliente
  - **Cloudways** -> Reportes de rendimiento integrados
  - **Better Uptime** -> Reportes SLA automáticos
- **Valor percibido:** El informe demuestra trabajo continuo. Combate "no veo el valor del mantenimiento"
- **Frecuencia:** Mensual + resumen trimestral con recomendaciones

### 4.3 UPGRADE PATHS (DE LANDING PAGE A TIENDA COMPLETA)

- **Landing Page ($49/mes):** Hosting, 1 página, SSL, email básico
- **Sitio Corporativo ($99/mes):** 5 páginas, blog, formulario, SEO básico, informes mensuales
- **Tienda Online ($199/mes):** E-commerce (WooCommerce/Shopify), catálogo de productos, carrito, pagos
- **Premium ($399/mes):** Tienda + CRM integrado + chatbot AI + reporting avanzado + horas de desarrollo

### 4.4 ESTRATEGIAS ADICIONALES

- **Programa de referidos:** Descuento para el referente y el nuevo cliente (ej. 1 mes gratis)
- **Automatización de dunning:** Recuperar churn involuntario (tarjeta vencida) — puede recuperar 20-40% de estos casos
- **Soporte proactivo:** Llamada trimestral de revisión, no solo email
- **Educación al cliente:** Tutoriales, webinars de cómo usar su web mejor
- **Encuestas NPS:** Detectar clientes insatisfechos antes de que cancelen
- **Kalyma Studio (España):** https://kalymastudio.es/soluciones/mantenimiento-wordpress-marca-blanca/ — Planes de mantenimiento white-label para agencias

### 4.5 MODELO DE INGRESOS RECURRENTES RECOMENDADO

```
Plan Básico:    $49/mes  -> Hosting + SSL + backups + soporte email
Plan Pro:       $99/mes  -> Hosting + mantenimiento WP + informes + 2h cambios
Plan Premium:   $199/mes -> Hosting premium + chatbot FAQ + SEO + 5h cambios + reporting
Plan Tienda:    $299/mes -> Todo Premium + e-commerce + integraciones + soporte prioritario
```

**Estrategia de margen:**
- Hosting Cloudways: ~$10-30/mes costo -> revender en bundle a $49-99/mes
- Email MXroute: ~$10/mes (75GB) -> revender cuentas a $3-5 cada una
- Chatbot Tidio: ~$25-50/mes -> incluir en plan Pro/Premium como valor agregado
- Monitoreo UptimeRobot: ~$38/mes -> revender acceso a status page como feature premium

---

# Research Report: White-label Platforms, Post-Sale AI Support Bots & Churn/Fidelización para Agencias Web LATAM

---

## 1. PLATAFORMAS WHITE-LABEL PARA AGENCIAS

### 1.1 HOSTING

#### Cloudways Partner Program
- **URL:** https://www.cloudways.com/en/reseller-hosting.php
- **Model:** Revender hosting administrado sobre DigitalOcean, AWS, GCP, Vultr, Linode
- **Costos base:** Desde $14/mes (1GB RAM, 1 core, 25GB storage) hasta $342/mes
- **Programa Partner (gratis):** Tiers Bronze (<$100/mes gasto), Silver ($100-$499), Gold ($500-$2,499), Platinum ($2,500+)
- **Beneficios:** White-label completo (dashboard, dominio, logo propio), 7% comision por referidos + $30/referido (hasta 10% + $50 en Platinum)
- **Volumen discounts 2026:** 10% off en $2K/mes, 15% en $5K/mes, 20% en $10K/mes
- **Margen tipico agencia:** 45-65% (con volumen)
- **Sin minimo:** $0 minimo, pay-as-you-go por hora
- **URL Agencia:** https://www.cloudways.com/blog/agency-partnership-program/

#### SiteGround White Label (Agency Program)
- **URL:** https://siteground.com/agencies
- **Planes:** GrowBig ($4.99/mo intro, renueva $29.99/mo), GoGeek ($7.99/mo intro, renueva $44.99/mo), Cloud (desde $100/mo)
- **White-label:** Solo en GoGeek y Cloud - Site Tools sin branding SiteGround + Private DNS
- **Paquetes personalizados:** En Cloud se puede definir recursos por sitio (CPU, RAM, espacio)
- **Programa Agencia gratuito:** Sin costo de afiliacion. 3 meses gratis de prueba.
- **Modelo:** Ideal para agencias que quieren hosting compartido administrado con marca propia.

#### DigitalOcean Partner Pod
- **URL:** https://www.digitalocean.com/partners/pod
- **Tiers:** Registered (5% descuento + 10% referral), Engaged (15% descuento, requiere $100K anuales), Strategic (25% descuento, requiere $1M+)
- **Modelos:** Advisory (referidos), Business (reventa), Technology (ISV)
- **Sin costo de entrada:** Se puede empezar con cuenta regular y usar API/WHMCS para automatizar
- **Margen:** 5-25% segun tier. Menor margen que Cloudways pero mas control de infraestructura

### 1.2 EMAIL PROFESIONAL

#### MXroute (White Label Reseller)
- **URL:** https://mxroute.com/reseller-info.html
- **Planes reseller:** Reseller75 (75GB, $30/trimestre = $10/mes), Reseller150 (150GB, $45/trimestre = $15/mes), Reseller200 (200GB, $25/mes)
- **Caracteristicas white-label:** Dominio propio para login (mailadmin.tudominio.com), personalizacion completa del panel (logo, colores, tema), cuentas separadas por cliente
- **Modelo:** Ilimitado en dominios y cuentas de correo. Limite por almacenamiento.
- **Margen potencial:** Compra a $10/mes, revende cada cuenta de correo a $3-5/mes/cliente. Con 10+ clientes, margen de 60-80%.
- **Planes regulares (para referencia):** Desde $59/anio (10GB) - buen benchmark de precio retail
- **Docs:** https://docs.mxroute.com/docs/presales/reseller-differences.html

#### Zoho White Label (Partnership Program)
- **URL:** https://www.zoho.com/partners/workplace-partnership-program.html
- **URL Mail Partners:** https://www.zoho.com/mail/email-partnership-program.html
- **Modelo:** Value-Added Reseller (VAR) - sin costo de afiliacion
- **Planes Zoho Mail:** Mail Lite ($1.25/user/mes anual), Mail Premium ($4/user/mes anual), Workplace Professional ($8/user/mes anual)
- **White-label:** Disponible en Premium y Workplace (logo propio, URL personalizada)
- **Comisiones:** Pricing no publico - se negocia descuento mayorista para revender
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que quieren email + productividad (Docs, Meet, Cliq) con marca blanca

#### Titan Email (by GoDaddy/Newfold Digital)
- **URL Partners:** https://titan.email/partners/
- **Modelo:** No venden directo al publico - solo a traves de partners (hosters, agencias, registrars)
- **Precio retail tipico:** $2.08/mes (10GB), $3.75/mes (50GB), $6.67/mes (100GB) por buzon
- **Precio partner:** No publico - se negocia por volumen. Ej. resellers ofrecen desde $1.95/buzon
- **Beneficios:** CRM integrado, campanas email marketing, booking, AI Smart Write
- **Casos destacados:** GoDaddy aumento ARPU 76% con Titan. HostGator Brazil mejoro NPS 12 pts.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias con +50 clientes de email. Se integra via API/iFrame.

### 1.3 SEGURIDAD WEB

#### Sucuri Partner Program
- **URL:** https://sucuri.net/partners/
- **Modelo:** Partner con descuentos por volumen. White-label completo.
- **Precios retail:** Basic ($229/anio), Pro ($339/anio), Business ($549/anio), Multi-Site (desde $999.98/anio)
- **Precios mayoristas:** No publicos - contacto con ventas. Volumen: up to 20% off en 10+ sitios.
- **Margen potencial:** 20-40% sobre precio retail
- **Programa Agencia:** https://sucuri.net/customers/implement-sucuri/ (descuentos volumen para 5+ sitios)
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que quieren revender firewall WAF + limpieza malware + CDN

#### Cloudflare Partner Programs
- **URL:** https://www.cloudflare.com/partners/
- **Programas:**
  - **PowerUP Partner Program:** Resell, Manage, Distribute, Consult
  - **Self-Serve Agency Program (Beta):** Dashboard multi-tenant, billing centralizado, planes con descuento
  - **URL Agency:** https://www.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-partners-self-serve-program-closed-beta/
- **Planes disponibles (Agency):** CF_FREE, CF_PRO_20_20 (~$20/mes), CF_BIZ (~$200/mes)
- **Margen:** Descuento no publico - se negocia segun volumen
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que ya usan Cloudflare y quieren revender Pro/Business con margen

### 1.4 MONITOREO

#### UptimeRobot White Label
- **URL:** https://uptimerobot.com/pricing/
- **Planes:** Free (50 monitores, no comercial desde Oct 2024), Solo ($9/mes anual, 10-50 monitores), Team ($38/mes anual, 100 monitores), Enterprise ($69/mes anual, 200+ monitores)
- **White-label status pages:** Incluido en Team y Enterprise - dominio propio, sin branding UptimeRobot
- **Margen:** Team a $38/mes, se puede revender a $79-99/mes como "monitoreo administrado"
- **Nota importante:** Free plan prohibido para uso comercial desde Oct 2024

#### Better Uptime (Better Stack)
- **URL:** https://betteruptime.com/pricing
- **Pricing:** $29/mes por responder (anual), incluye 10 monitores + 1 status page
- **White-label:** $250/mes por pagina (remover "Powered by Better Stack")
- **Monitores adicionales:** $21/mes por 50
- **Modelo:** Per-responder (se multiplica por equipo)
- **Alternativa mas barata:** UptimeSignal ($10/mes flat, monitores ilimitados)

### 1.5 TABLA COMPARATIVA DE MARGENES

| Servicio | Costo al mes (aprox.) | Precio reventa tipico | Margen bruto |
|---|---|---|---|
| Cloudways (50 sites) | $84/servidor DigitalOcean | $29-49/site/mes | 45-65% |
| SiteGround GoGeek | $7.99 intro / $44.99 renovacion | $15-30/site/mes | 40-60% |
| MXroute Reseller75 | $10/mes (75GB total) | $3-5/cuenta/mes | 60-80% |
| Zoho Mail Premium | $4/user/mes (mayorista) | $7-10/user/mes | 40-60% |
| Titan Email | ~$1.50-2/buzon/mes (partner) | $3-6/buzon/mes | 50-70% |
| Sucuri Pro | $28/mes (volumen) | $48/mes retail | 35-45% |
| UptimeRobot Team | $38/mes | $79-99/mes | 50-60% |

---

## 2. MINI-BOTS DE SOPORTE POST-VENTA

### 2.1 Botpress
- **URL:** https://botpress.com/
- **URL Pricing:** https://botpress.com/pricing
- **URL PostgreSQL Integration:** https://botpress.com/integrations/postgresql
- **URL Knowledge Bases:** https://botpress.com/features/knowledge-bases
- **Modelo:** Open-source + cloud SaaS con integracion nativa a PostgreSQL (lectura directa de BD de productos)
- **Planes:** Pay-as-you-go ($0 + $5 AI credit), Plus ($79/mes anual, 5,000 mensajes), Team ($445/mes anual, 50,000 mensajes), Managed ($1,245/mes anual), Enterprise (custom)
- **Knowledge Base:** Importa URLs, PDFs, CSVs, tablas - bot responde preguntas de productos automaticamente
- **Integracion Supabase/Postgres:** Conexion directa a PostgreSQL para query data en tiempo real
- **Caso de uso perfecto:** Bot que lee tabla de productos/precios del cliente desde Supabase y responde FAQs
- **AI Spend adicional:** $100/mes max (PAYG/Plus), $500/mes (Team). Sin markup en LLMs.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias con clientes medianos que necesitan bot sofisticado con BD propia

### 2.2 Tidio (Lyro AI Agent)
- **URL:** https://tidio.com/
- **URL Pricing:** https://tidio.com/pricing
- **Modelo:** SaaS chatbot + live chat + ticketing
- **Planes:** Free (50 conversaciones/mes), Starter ($24.17/mes, 100 conversaciones), Growth ($49.17/mes, 250+), Plus ($749/mes), Premium (custom)
- **Lyro AI Agent standalone:** Desde $32.50/mes por 50 conversaciones AI
- **Funcionalidad FAQ:** Lyro aprende de tu contenido de soporte - puede resolver hasta 67% de preguntas
- **Integracion DB:** No tiene integracion directa a PostgreSQL/Supabase como Botpress, pero se puede conectar via Zapier/Make
- **Ideal para:** Agencias pequenas, implementacion rapida (< 1 hora), buena relacion costo-beneficio

### 2.3 ManyChat
- **URL:** https://manychat.com/
- **URL Pricing:** https://manychat.com/pricing
- **URL AI Knowledge:** https://help.manychat.com/hc/en-us/articles/25626595060124-Manychat-AI-Knowledge
- **Modelo:** Plataforma de chat marketing (Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger)
- **Precios:** Desde $29/mo (2,500 contactos activos, 3 canales), $69/mo, $139/mo
- **AI Knowledge Base:** Agrega texto plano y URLs publicas. NO soporta PDFs, imagenes, ni BD externas.
- **Limitacion:** No integracion directa a PostgreSQL/Supabase. Solo URLs publicas y texto manual.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias que usan Instagram/WhatsApp para soporte, NO para leer BD de productos

### 2.4 Chatwoot (Open Source/Gratuito)
- **URL:** https://www.chatwoot.com/
- **URL Self-Hosted Pricing:** https://www.chatwoot.com/pricing/self-hosted-plans/
- **Modelo:** Open source (MIT License) - auto-hospedado o cloud
- **Precios Self-hosted:** Community ($0/agente/mes), Premium Support ($19/agente/mes), Enterprise ($99/agente/mes)
- **Captain AI:** Reply suggestions, conversation summaries, AI assistant (usa OpenAI GPT). Solo en Premium/Enterprise.
- **Integracion DB:** Se puede conectar PostgreSQL a traves de API/webhooks, pero no es nativo.
- **Requisitos servidor:** 4GB RAM, 2 CPU, PostgreSQL, Redis, 60GB SSD
- **Lo mejor:** Es GRATIS (Community Edition). Sin limite de agentes. Ideal para bootstrap.
- **Limitacion:** El AI chatbot no es tan plug-and-play como Tidio o Botpress. Requiere desarrollo.
- **Ideal para:** Agencias con stack tecnico que quieren control total + ahorro extremo

### 2.5 TABLA COMPARATIVA CHATBOTS FAQ

| Plataforma | Costo minimo | Integracion PostgreSQL/Supabase | AI FAQ automatico | Ideal para |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Botpress** | $0 (500 msgs/mes) | SI Nativa (PostgreSQL) | SI Knowledge Base con tablas | Clientes medianos con BD de productos |
| **Tidio Lyro** | $24.17/mes | NO (via Zapier) | SI Aprende de contenido soporte | Implementacion rapida, SMBs |
| **ManyChat** | $29/mes | NO (solo URLs/texto) | SI Knowledge Base texto/URLs | Soporte via Instagram/WhatsApp |
| **Chatwoot** | $0 (self-hosted) | PARCIAL (via API manual) | PARCIAL Captain AI (Premium+) | Agencias tecnicas, presupuesto cero |

---

## 3. CHURN EN AGENCIAS WEB LATAM

### 3.1 ESTADISTICAS CLAVE

- **62%** de agencias reportan perder clientes por temas tecnicos, NO por desacuerdos creativos o presupuesto (Agency Analytics 2024)
- **56%** de clientes de hosting se van por precio (Web Hosting Trends Report 2026, CloudLinux)
- **41%** se van a plataformas SaaS como Wix, Shopify, Squarespace
- **12%** churn rate en el primer anio para agencias digitales (IT sector benchmark)
- **29%** se van por rendimiento del sitio lento
- **25%** por funcionalidades faltantes vs competidores
- **19%** por incidentes de seguridad (malware, hacks)
- **18%** por mala experiencia de soporte

### 3.2 RAZONES PRINCIPALES POR LAS QUE CLIENTES CANCELAN HOSTING/MANTENIMIENTO

1. **Precio (56%)** - Encuentran hosting mas barato (Hostinger, GoDaddy promos, DonWeb en LATAM)
2. **Migracion a SaaS (41%)** - Clientes migran a Wix, Shopify, Squarespace por simplicidad
3. **Rendimiento lento (29%)** - Sitios que cargan en 6s vs 2s = pierden 32% de leads
4. **No ven el valor** - El cliente siente que "la web ya esta hecha" y no necesita mantenimiento mensual
5. **Falta de comunicacion** - 19% se van por mala comunicacion en emergencias
6. **Soporte reactivo en vez de proactivo** - Agencias que solo responden cuando algo se rompe
7. **Outgrow** - Cliente crece y necesita features que la agencia no ofrece (e-commerce, multi-idioma)
8. **Falta de reporting** - No reciben informes de rendimiento, uptime, trafico

### 3.3 DATOS ESPECIFICOS LATAM

- **DonWeb (Argentina)** registro ~2,947 perdidas de dominios en 30 dias (fuente whoare.io)
- **Cloudflare LATAM** ~875 perdidas en mismo periodo
- **Hostinger LATAM** ~1,135 perdidas
- El mercado LATAM es altamente sensible al precio. Promociones agresivas de Hostinger, GoDaddy, DonWeb generan mucho churn.
- **Barreras bajas de salida:** En LATAM muchos clientes no firman contratos anuales, pagan mes a mes.

### 3.4 COMO EL HOSTING IMPACTA EL CHURN
- Agencias que usan shared hosting barato: **68%** retencion (vs 91% con managed WordPress hosting)
- Al migrar a managed hosting: client lifetime value sube de $24K a $42K
- Tiempo en soporte tecnico se reduce **75%**
- Las agencias ahorran ~$25,000/anio al reducir churn con mejor hosting (fuente: TopSyde case study)

---

## 4. PLANES DE FIDELIZACION PARA AGENCIAS EN MERCADOS PEQUENOS

### 4.1 BUNDLES ANUALES CON DESCUENTO

- **Modelo probado:** Ofrecer 2 meses gratis si pagan el anio completo de mantenimiento/hosting
- **Ejemplo:** Mantenimiento mensual $49/mes -> $490/anio (ahorran ~$98 vs $588)
- **Dominio + hosting + email:** Bundle anual $199/anio (vs $250+ por separado)
- **Referencia:** Hosting Plus Colombia recomienda contratos anuales para reducir churn
- **InMotion Hosting (es):** https://www.inmotionhosting.com/es/blog/agency-recurring-revenue-model/

### 4.2 INFORMES MENSUALES DE RENDIMIENTO (REPORTING AUTOMATICO)

- **Que incluir:** Uptime % del mes, velocidad de carga, trafico estimado, backups realizados, incidentes resueltos
- **Herramientas para automatizar:**
  - **UptimeRobot** -> Status pages white-label embedidas en dashboard del cliente
  - **Cloudways** -> Reportes de rendimiento integrados
  - **Better Uptime** -> Reportes SLA automaticos
- **Valor percibido:** El informe demuestra trabajo continuo. Combate "no veo el valor del mantenimiento"
- **Frecuencia:** Mensual + resumen trimestral con recomendaciones

### 4.3 UPGRADE PATHS (DE LANDING PAGE A TIENDA COMPLETA)

- **Landing Page ($49/mes):** Hosting, 1 pagina, SSL, email basico
- **Sitio Corporativo ($99/mes):** 5 paginas, blog, formulario, SEO basico, informes mensuales
- **Tienda Online ($199/mes):** E-commerce (WooCommerce/Shopify), catalogo de productos, carrito, pagos
- **Premium ($399/mes):** Tienda + CRM integrado + chatbot AI + reporting avanzado + horas de desarrollo

### 4.4 ESTRATEGIAS ADICIONALES

- **Programa de referidos:** Descuento para el referente y el nuevo cliente (ej. 1 mes gratis)
- **Automatizacion de dunning:** Recuperar churn involuntario (tarjeta vencida) - puede recuperar 20-40% de estos casos
- **Soporte proactivo:** Llamada trimestral de revision, no solo email
- **Educacion al cliente:** Tutoriales, webinars de como usar su web mejor
- **Encuestas NPS:** Detectar clientes insatisfechos antes de que cancelen
- **Kalyma Studio (Espana):** https://kalymastudio.es/soluciones/mantenimiento-wordpress-marca-blanca/ - Planes de mantenimiento white-label para agencias

### 4.5 MODELO DE INGRESOS RECURRENTES RECOMENDADO

```
Plan Basico:    $49/mes  -> Hosting + SSL + backups + soporte email
Plan Pro:       $99/mes  -> Hosting + mantenimiento WP + informes + 2h cambios
Plan Premium:   $199/mes -> Hosting premium + chatbot FAQ + SEO + 5h cambios + reporting
Plan Tienda:    $299/mes -> Todo Premium + e-commerce + integraciones + soporte prioritario
```

**Estrategia de margen:**
- Hosting Cloudways: ~$10-30/mes costo -> revender en bundle a $49-99/mes
- Email MXroute: ~$10/mes (75GB) -> revender cuentas a $3-5 cada una
- Chatbot Tidio: ~$25-50/mes -> incluir en plan Pro/Premium como valor agregado
- Monitoreo UptimeRobot: ~$38/mes -> revender acceso a status page como feature premium

## 1. PLATAFORMAS WHITE-LABEL PARA AGENCIAS

#### Cloudways Partner Program

- **Model:** Revender hosting administrado sobre DigitalOcean, AWS, GCP, Vultr, Linode
- **Costos base:** Desde $14/mes (1GB RAM, 1 core, 25GB storage) hasta $342/mes
- **Programa Partner (gratis):** Tiers Bronze (<$100/mes gasto), Silver ($100-$499), Gold ($500-$2,499), Platinum ($2,500+)
- **Beneficios:** White-label completo (dashboard, dominio, logo propio), 7% comision por referidos + $30/referido (hasta 10% + $50 en Platinum)

#### SiteGround White Label (Agency Program)

content = '''# Research Report: White-label Platforms, Post-Sale AI Support Bots & Churn/Fidelizacion para Agencias Web LATAM

---

## 1. PLATAFORMAS WHITE-LABEL PARA AGENCIAS

### 1.1 HOSTING

#### Cloudways Partner Program
- URL: https://www.cloudways.com/en/reseller-hosting.php
- Model: Revender hosting administrado sobre DigitalOcean, AWS, GCP, Vultr, Linode
- Costos base: Desde $14/mes (1GB RAM, 1 core, 25GB storage) hasta $342/mes
- Programa Partner (gratis): Tiers Bronze (<$100/mes), Silver ($100-$499), Gold ($500-$2,499), Platinum ($2,500+)
- Beneficios: White-label completo, 7% comision referidos + $30/referido (hasta 10% + $50 Platinum)
- Volumen discounts 2026: 10% off en $2K/mes, 15% en $5K/mes, 20% en $10K/mes
- Margen tipico agencia: 45-65% (con volumen)
- URL Agencia: https://www.cloudways.com/blog/agency-partnership-program/

#### SiteGround White Label (Agency Program)
- URL: https://siteground.com/agencies
- Planes: GrowBig ($4.99/mo intro, renueva $29.99/mo), GoGeek ($7.99/mo intro, renueva $44.99/mo), Cloud (desde $100/mo)
- White-label: Solo en GoGeek y Cloud - Site Tools sin branding SG + Private DNS
- Paquetes personalizados: en Cloud se puede definir recursos por sitio
- Programa Agencia gratuito, 3 meses gratis de prueba

#### DigitalOcean Partner Pod
- URL: https://www.digitalocean.com/partners/pod
- Tiers: Registered (5% desc + 10% referral), Engaged (15% desc, $100K anuales), Strategic (25% desc, $1M+)
- Margen: 5-25% segun tier. Menor margen que Cloudways pero mas control.

### 1.2 EMAIL PROFESIONAL

#### MXroute (White Label Reseller)
- URL: https://mxroute.com/reseller-info.html
- Planes: Reseller75 (75GB, $10/mes), Reseller150 (150GB, $15/mes), Reseller200 (200GB, $25/mes)
- White-label: Dominio propio, panel personalizable, cuentas separadas por cliente
- Margen: $10/mes -> revender $3-5/cuenta -> 60-80% margen

#### Zoho White Label
- URL: https://www.zoho.com/mail/email-partnership-program.html
- Planes: Mail Lite ($1.25/user/mes), Mail Premium ($4/user/mes)
- White-label en Premium y Workplace (logo propio, URL personalizada)

#### Titan Email (GoDaddy/Newfold)
- URL Partners: https://titan.email/partners/
- Retail: $2.08/mes (10GB), $3.75/mes (50GB), $6.67/mes (100GB) por buzon
- Partner pricing: negociado por volumen
- GoDaddy aumento ARPU 76% con Titan

### 1.3 SEGURIDAD WEB

#### Sucuri Partner Program
- URL: https://sucuri.net/partners/
- Retail: Basic $229/yr, Pro $339/yr, Business $549/yr
- Volumen: hasta 20% off en 10+ sitios. Margen 20-40%

#### Cloudflare Agency Program
- URL: https://www.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-partners-self-serve-program-closed-beta/
- Planes Agency: CF_PRO_20_20 (~$20/mes), CF_BIZ (~$200/mes)
- PowerUP Program: https://www.cloudflare.com/partners/services/

### 1.4 MONITOREO

#### UptimeRobot White Label
- URL: https://uptimerobot.com/pricing/
- Planes: Free (50 monitores, NO comercial desde Oct 2024), Solo ($9/mes), Team ($38/mes, incluye white-label), Enterprise ($69/mes)
- Revender Team a $79-99/mes -> margen 50-60%

#### Better Uptime
- URL: https://betteruptime.com/pricing
- $29/mes/responder + status page + white-label $250/mes extra
- Alternativa barata: UptimeSignal ($10/mes flat)

### 1.5 TABLA MARGENES

| Servicio | Costo/mes | Precio reventa | Margen |
|---|---|---|---|
| Cloudways (50 sites) | $84/servidor DO | $29-49/site | 45-65% |
| SiteGround GoGeek | $7.99-44.99 | $15-30/site | 40-60% |
| MXroute Reseller75 | $10 (75GB) | $3-5/cuenta | 60-80% |
| Zoho Mail Premium | $4/user | $7-10/user | 40-60% |
| Titan Email | ~$1.50-2/buzon | $3-6/buzon | 50-70% |
| Sucuri Pro | $28/mes (vol) | $48/mes | 35-45% |
| UptimeRobot Team | $38/mes | $79-99/mes | 50-60% |

---

## 2. MINI-BOTS DE SOPORTE POST-VENTA

### 2.1 Botpress (RECOMENDADO para BD de productos)
- URL: https://botpress.com/ | Pricing: https://botpress.com/pricing
- URL PostgreSQL: https://botpress.com/integrations/postgresql
- Integracion NATIVA a PostgreSQL/Supabase - lee tabla de productos en tiempo real
- Planes: $0 (500 msgs), $79/mes (5,000), $445/mes (50,000), $1,245/mes (Managed)
- Knowledge Base: URLs, PDFs, CSVs, tablas -> responde FAQs automaticamente
- AI Spend: $100/mes max (PAYG/Plus), $500/mes (Team), sin markup en LLMs
- Mejor opcion para: bot que lee catalogo de productos y responde preguntas de clientes

### 2.2 Tidio Lyro (RECOMENDADO para SMBs)
- URL: https://tidio.com/ | Pricing: https://tidio.com/pricing
- Starter $24.17/mes (100 conversaciones), Lyro standalone $32.50/mes
- Resuelve hasta 67% de preguntas comunes automaticamente
- Sin integracion DB nativa (via Zapier/Make)
- Implementacion en < 1 hora

### 2.3 ManyChat
- URL: https://manychat.com/ | Desde $29/mo
- AI Knowledge Base: solo texto y URLs publicas. SIN BD.
- Ideal para Instagram/WhatsApp, NO para catalogo de productos

### 2.4 Chatwoot (Open Source)
- URL: https://www.chatwoot.com/pricing/self-hosted-plans/
- Community Edition: $0/agente/mes (MIT License)
- Premium Support: $19/agente/mes (Captain AI incluido)
- Requiere: 4GB RAM, 2 CPU, PostgreSQL, Redis
- Captain AI: reply suggestions, summaries (solo Premium+)

### 2.5 TABLA CHATBOTS

| Plataforma | Costo minimo | Integracion PgSQL | AI FAQ | Ideal para |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Botpress | $0 (500 msgs) | SI Nativa | SI | BD de productos |
| Tidio Lyro | $24.17/mes | NO (Zapier) | SI (67%) | Rapido, SMBs |
| ManyChat | $29/mes | NO | SI (texto) | Instagram/WAP |
| Chatwoot | $0 (self-host) | PARCIAL (API) | PARCIAL (Prem+) | Tecnicas, $0 |

---

## 3. CHURN EN AGENCIAS WEB LATAM

### 3.1 ESTADISTICAS CLAVE
- 62% de agencias pierden clientes por temas TECNICOS (Agency Analytics 2024)
- 56% se van por PRECIO (Web Hosting Trends 2026 - CloudLinux)
- 41% migran a SaaS (Wix, Shopify, Squarespace)
- 12% churn rate en primer anio (IT sector)
- 29% por rendimiento lento
- 25% por features faltantes
- 19% por incidentes de seguridad
- 18% por mala experiencia de soporte

### 3.2 RAZONES CANCELACION HOSTING/MANTENIMIENTO
1. Precio (56%) - Hostinger, GoDaddy, DonWeb en LATAM
2. Migracion a SaaS (41%) - prefieren Wix/Shopify
3. Rendimiento lento (29%) - 6s vs 2s = 32% menos leads
4. No ven valor - "la web ya esta hecha"
5. Mala comunicacion en emergencias (19%)
6. Soporte reactivo vs proactivo
7. Outgrow - necesitan e-commerce que la agencia no ofrece
8. Sin reporting - no reciben informes mensuales

### 3.3 DATOS LATAM (whoare.io, 30d)
- DonWeb Argentina: ~2,947 dominios perdidos
- Cloudflare LATAM: ~875 perdidos
- Hostinger LATAM: ~1,135 perdidos
- Mercado LATAM: ALTAMENTE sensible al precio

### 3.4 IMPACTO DEL HOSTING EN CHURN (TopSyde case study)
- Shared hosting barato: 68% retencion
- Managed WordPress: 91% retencion (+23%)
- CLV sube de $24K a $42K al migrar a managed
- Tiempo soporte se reduce 75%
- Ahorro ~$25,000/anio en churn reducido
- Fuente: https://topsyde.com/blog/agency-client-retention-hosting

---

## 4. PLANES DE FIDELIZACION

### 4.1 BUNDLES ANUALES
- 2 meses gratis si pagan anio completo
- Hosting+dominio+email: $199/anio (vs $250+ separado)
- Contratos anuales reducen churn significativamente (Hosting Plus Colombia)

### 4.2 REPORTING AUTOMATICO
- Incluir: uptime%, velocidad, trafico, backups, incidentes
- UptimeRobot status pages embedidas en dashboard del cliente
- Combate "no veo el valor del mantenimiento"
- Frecuencia: mensual + trimestral con recomendaciones

### 4.3 UPGRADE PATHS
- Landing Page ($49/mes): Hosting, 1 pag, SSL, email
- Corporativo ($99/mes): 5 pags, blog, formulario, SEO, informes
- Tienda Online ($199/mes): E-commerce, catalogo, carrito, pagos
- Premium ($399/mes): Tienda + CRM + chatbot AI + reporting avanzado

### 4.4 ESTRATEGIAS ADICIONALES
- Referidos: 1 mes gratis al referente y referido
- Dunning: recupera 20-40% churn involuntario
- Soporte proactivo: llamadas trimestrales
- Educacion: webinars, tutoriales de uso
- Encuestas NPS para detectar riesgo antes de cancelacion

### 4.5 MODELO RECOMENDADO
Plan Basico:    $49/mes (hosting+SSL+backups+email)
Plan Pro:       $99/mes (+WP maint+informes+2h cambios)
Plan Premium:   $199/mes (+chatbot FAQ+SEO+5h cambios+reporting)
Plan Tienda:    $299/mes (+e-commerce+integraciones+soporte prioritario)

Estrategia margenes:
- Hosting Cloudways $10-30 -> bundle $49-99
- Email MXroute $10/mes -> $3-5/cuenta
- Chatbot Tidio $25-50 -> incluido en Premium como valor agregado
- Monitoreo UptimeRobot $38 -> status page como feature premium

---

## 5. URLs RESUMEN

| Categoria | Recurso | URL |
|---|---|---|
| Hosting | Cloudways Partner | https://www.cloudways.com/blog/agency-partnership-program/ |
| Hosting | SiteGround Agency | https://siteground.com/agencies |
| Hosting | DigitalOcean Pod | https://www.digitalocean.com/partners/pod |
| Email | MXroute Reseller | https://mxroute.com/reseller-info.html |
| Email | Zoho Mail Partners | https://www.zoho.com/mail/email-partnership-program.html |
| Email | Titan Partners | https://titan.email/partners/ |
| Seguridad | Sucuri Partner | https://sucuri.net/partners/ |
| Seguridad | Cloudflare Agency | https://www.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-partners-self-serve-program-closed-beta/ |
| Monitoreo | UptimeRobot | https://uptimerobot.com/pricing/ |
| Monitoreo | Better Uptime | https://betteruptime.com/pricing |
| Chatbots | Botpress | https://botpress.com/pricing |
| Chatbots | Tidio | https://tidio.com/pricing |
| Chatbots | Chatwoot | https://www.chatwoot.com/pricing/self-hosted-plans/ |
| Chatbots | ManyChat | https://manychat.com/pricing |
| Churn | Hosting Trends 2026 | https://cloudlinux.com/resources/web-hosting-trends-report-2026/download-full-report |
| Churn | Agency Retention | https://topsyde.com/blog/agency-client-retention-hosting |
| Churn | Why Lose Clients | https://whitelabelninja.com/why-do-most-digital-agencies-lose-clients-after-the-first-year/ |
| Fideliz | InMotion Recurrente ES | https://www.inmotionhosting.com/es/blog/agency-recurring-revenue-model/ |
| Fideliz | dinahosting Retencion | https://dinahosting.com/blog/retencion-clientes-guia/ |
| Fideliz | Kalyma WP WL | https://kalymastudio.es/soluciones/mantenimiento-wordpress-marca-blanca/ |
'''

with open('research_white_label_churn_latam.md', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
print('File written. Size:', len(content), 'bytes')
"
", "timeout": 10}

---

## 1. PLATAFORMAS WHITE-LABEL PARA AGENCIAS

### 1.1 HOSTING

#### Cloudways Partner Program
- URL: https://www.cloudways.com/en/reseller-hosting.php
- Model: Revender hosting administrado sobre DigitalOcean, AWS, GCP, Vultr, Linode
- Costos base: Desde $14/mes (1GB RAM, 1 core, 25GB storage) hasta $342/mes
